name: Hydraulic Pack-Converter Crash Fix
description: Patches the Geyser+Hydraulic+Bedframe stack for Bedrock players: wraps Hydraulic's (Bedframe-supplied) pack-converter so one failing texture transformer no longer aborts the whole pack conversion, quietly skips the doomed vanilla grid-spritesheet particle transformers, redirects modded blocks' break-particle texture to the block's own in-pack texture, lengthens the Bedrock destructible_by_mining timer so survival breaking works, lets the server boot on Geyser builds that dropped the custom-entity API by disabling Bedframe's entity translators when that API is absent, and converts Bedrock-bound items that carry modded data components through Polymer's round-trip so Geyser can read modded inventories/chests without desyncing item pickup/placement.
